description: PDF Generator API is a service for generating PDF documents and related outputs from templates and JSON data. It also provides a browser-based template editor and related document-processing features such as HTML-to-PDF conversion, QR code generation, and e-invoicing.
summary: PDF Generator API exposes authenticated HTTP APIs for document generation/template management (v3 and v4) plus an official streamable-HTTP MCP server; all documented surfaces use JWT bearer auth derived from an account API key and secret.
